name: Harvard college
description:
Welcome to Harvard College where high standards lay in this college yes harvard is rich once you walk in its beautiful big spaces towering walls a staircase that curls going up while the main area is huge where new students meet for an interview to meet these high standards of harvard, Harvard GPA is usually 3.8 or 4.0 which they accept the students who have the high GPA but if you have low below standards they will kindly not accept you to meet there standards. Harvard is a college that many students wanna go to meet high standards while having a high GPA while others not so much. The uniform for harvard is black and red repsenting the schools aura along with if you play football its also alhletic with the logo colors along with the big H repsenting Harvard and its rich high high standards.

So will you reach that high standards and prove yourself?.
creator: laniibearr
